privileged_info_summary: The task is a FreeScout helpdesk support simulation requiring creation of a phone conversation (type=2) in the IT Support mailbox for customer David Chen (david.chen@acmecorp.com). The conversation subject must be 'Network Printer Not Detected - HP LaserJet Pro M404n' and the body must include specific keywords: 'HP LaserJet Pro M404n', '192.168.1.45', 'print spooler', and 'Windows 11'. All test data is synthetically generated during task setup.
